headline: Enforcing Principle-Based Coding Patterns for AI Agents
lede: This structural framework mandates that LLMs adopt a 'think-before-coding' protocol to minimize technical debt. By implementing rigorous CLAUDE.md configuration files, developers move agents from erratic behavior toward disciplined, goal-driven execution.

headline: Establishing Long-Term Memory for Persistent AI Coding Sessions
lede: Claude-Mem introduces a fluid retrieval layer that bridges the gap between disconnected coding sessions. By indexing project history through a hybrid SQLite and vector search engine, the system minimizes token overhead while maintaining deep state continuity.

headline: Local-First Voice Generation Without Cloud Dependencies
lede: Voicebox rejects the surveillance of proprietary cloud-based audio services in favor of private, high-performance local inference. This Rust-powered studio ensures that your media production pipeline remains entirely under your control and off the grid.

headline: High-Performance 3D Modeling for Browser-Based Architectural Workflows
lede: Pascal Editor leverages WebGPU and React Three Fiber to bring CAD-level spatial editing to the web. Its modular architecture handles complex geometric CSG operations with a fluid, performant rendering loop designed for digital twins.

headline: Streamlining Multi-Format Document Conversion for RAG Pipelines
lede: MarkItDown bridges the gap between legacy document chaos and modern LLM token consumption. This utility standardizes PDFs, images, and audio into machine-readable Markdown, providing a stable foundation for scalable data-driven infrastructure.

headline: Standardizing Engineering Discipline for Autonomous Agentic Teams
lede: Superpowers transforms AI coding agents by embedding Socratic planning and test-driven development directly into their core loops. This blueprint provides a repeatable methodology for executing complex software projects with professional-grade rigor.

headline: Preserving the Original Assembly Logic of Apollo 11
lede: This repository serves as a critical scholarly record of the guidance code that powered the first lunar landing. By archiving the Comanche and Luminary assembly files, the project honors the foundational software engineering that moved humanity beyond the atmosphere.

headline: Simulating Quantitative Hedge Funds With Multi-Agent Systems
lede: This project iterates on the concept of automated financial analysis by delegating tasks to specialized investor-personality agents. It is a raw, playful exploration into how diverse LLM perspectives can synthesize complex market signals.

headline: Quantizing Market Data Into Autoregressive Financial Foundation Models
lede: Kronos provides a novel architecture for interpreting K-line sequences through hierarchical tokenization and Transformers. It stands as a benchmarking-focused tool for researchers looking to apply deep learning to high-noise financial time-series data.

headline: Scaling the Self-Improving Autonomous Assistant Framework
lede: Hermes Agent bridges the gap between simple chatbots and persistent, evolving digital agents. Through a continuous learning loop and multi-provider compatibility, it establishes a new benchmark for utility-driven AI agents.
